title: Corporate Managers & Directors
exposure_rationale: High-level strategic decision making and leadership are resilient, but administrative and reporting tasks are increasingly automated.

title: Software & System Developers
exposure_rationale: Core digital work product and quantitative thinking are highly susceptible to LLM-driven productivity gains and automation.

title: Doctors & Health Professionals
exposure_rationale: AI supports diagnostics and analysis, but patient care, surgery, and human judgment provide a significant barrier.

title: Teachers & Educators
exposure_rationale: Deeply human-centric social and emotional intelligence requirements make full automation unlikely; AI remains an assistant.

title: Business & Admin Professionals
exposure_rationale: Information-heavy roles in accounting, law, and HR are facing major restructuring due to generative AI capabilities.

title: Science & Eng. Technicians
exposure_rationale: Semi-skilled technical work involves a mix of physical operation and data processing that AI can partially manage.

title: Clerical Support Workers
exposure_rationale: Routine digital information processing is the 'low hanging fruit' for current AI technologies; high risk of displacement.

title: Shop & Sales Workers
exposure_rationale: Hybrid of physical retail assistance and digital inventory/checkout tasks. Human presence is still valued for sales.

title: Personal Care Workers
exposure_rationale: High degree of physical dexterity, empathy, and unpredictable human interaction requirements.

title: Skilled Agricultural & Forestry
exposure_rationale: Outdoor, variable environments and manual labor components make AI/Robotics integration slow and costly.

title: Building & Related Trades
exposure_rationale: Complex physical labor in changing environments is extremely difficult for current robotics/AI systems.

title: Metal & Machinery Workers
exposure_rationale: AI/Robotics are common in manufacturing, but custom machine work and repair still require skilled human operators.

title: Drivers & Mobile Plant Ops
exposure_rationale: Highway driving is highly exposed to automation, though urban navigation and manual loading remain complex.

title: Stationary Plant & Machine Ops
exposure_rationale: Repetitive indoor machine operation is well-suited for traditional automation and AI optimization.

title: Cleaners & Helpers
exposure_rationale: Unstructured physical environments and low economic incentive for complex robotics provide high resistance.

title: Laborers in Mining & Manu.
exposure_rationale: Manual labor in predictable settings is susceptible to physical automation/conveyor-belt robotics.
